columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description:
The date and time that the line was written to the database.

This is used when there are multiple lines for each identity, such as when a change is detected, or if 24 hours have passed since the last database line was added.

columns.name: ReportId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the event

columns.name: AccountObjectId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the account in Microsoft Entra ID

columns.name: AccountUpn
columns.description: User principal name (UPN) of the account

columns.name: OnPremSid
columns.description: On-premises security identifier (SID) of the account

columns.name: AccountDisplayName
columns.description: Name of the account user displayed in the address book. Typically a combination of a given or first name, a middle initial, and a last name or surname.

columns.name: AccountName
columns.description: User name of the account

columns.name: AccountDomain
columns.description: Domain of the account

columns.name: CriticalityLevel
columns.description: The criticality score of the account

columns.name: Type
columns.description: Type of identity; possible values: User, ServiceAccount

columns.name: DistinguishedName
columns.description: The user's [distinguished name](/previous-versions/windows/desktop/ldap/distinguished-names)

columns.name: CloudSid
columns.description: Cloud security identifier of the account

columns.name: GivenName
columns.description: Given name or first name of the account user

columns.name: Surname
columns.description: Surname, family name, or last name of the account user

columns.name: Department
columns.description: Name of the department that the account user belongs to

columns.name: JobTitle
columns.description: Job title of the account user

columns.name: EmailAddress
columns.description: SMTP address of the account

columns.name: SipProxyAddress
columns.description: Voice over IP (VOIP) session initiation protocol (SIP) address of the account

columns.name: Address
columns.description: Address of the account user

columns.name: City
columns.description: City where the account user is located

columns.name: Country
columns.description: Country/Region where the account user is located

columns.name: IsAccountEnabled
columns.description: Indicates whether the account is enabled or not

columns.name: Manager
columns.description: The listed manager of the account user

columns.name: Phone
columns.description: The listed phone number of the account user

columns.name: CreatedDateTime
columns.description: Date and time when the account user was created

columns.name: ChangeSource
columns.description: Identifies which identity provider or process triggered the addition of the new row. For example, the `System-UserPersistence` value is used for any rows added by an automated process.

columns.name: BlastRadius
columns.description: A calculation based on the position of the user in the org tree and the user's Microsoft Entra roles and permissions; possible values: Low, Medium, High

columns.name: CompanyName
columns.description: Name of the company for which the user works

columns.name: DeletedDateTime
columns.description: Date and time when the user account was deleted

columns.name: EmployeeId
columns.description: Employee identifier assigned to the user by the organization

columns.name: OtherMailAddresses
columns.description: Additional email addresses of the user account

columns.name: RiskLevel
columns.description: Microsoft Entra ID risk level of the user account; possible values: Low, Medium, High

columns.name: RiskLevelDetails
columns.description: Details regarding the Microsoft Entra ID risk level

columns.name: State
columns.description: State where the sign-in occurred, if available

columns.name: Tags
columns.description: Tags assigned to the account user by Defender for Identity

columns.name: AssignedRoles
columns.description: For identities from Microsoft Entra-only, the roles assigned to the account user

columns.name: PrivilegedEntraPimRoles` (Preview)
columns.description: A snapshot of privileged role assignment schedules and eligibility schedules for the account as maintained by Microsoft Entra Privileged Identity Management (excluding activated assignments)

columns.name: TenantId
columns.description: Unique identifier representing your organization's instance of Microsoft Entra ID

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The source system for the record

columns.name: OnPremObjectId
columns.description: Active Directory object ID of the user

columns.name: TenantMembershipType
columns.description: User type in Microsoft Entra ID; possible values: Guest, Member

columns.name: RiskStatus
columns.description: Status of the user's risk; possible values: None, ConfirmedSafe, Remediated, Dismissed, AtRisk, ConfirmedCompromised, UnknownFutureValue

columns.name: UserAccountControl
columns.description: Security attributes of the user account in the Active Directory domain

columns.name: IdentityEnvironment
columns.description: Environment where the identity is used; possible values: CloudOnly, Hybrid, On-premises

columns.name: SourceProviders
columns.description: Source providers of the accounts for the identity; possible values: ActiveDirectory, EntraID, Okta

columns.name: GroupMembership
columns.description: Microsoft Entra ID groups where the user account is a member
